violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has an employee certified through an approved food safety management course. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of the dairy reach-in observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket is to be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must successfully complete an approved course in food safety management and register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the dairy reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown/black residue and other debris. Ice machine is to be properly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of a couple of the beverage/creamer dispensers have an accumulation of dried residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
